title: One Punch Ends Bellamy’s Boast
description: Luffy ends Bellamy’s mockery with a single decisive blow, proving that dreams are not weakness.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy, Nami. Luffy ends Bellamy’s mockery with a single decisive blow, proving that dreams are not weakness.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: So there was no Capt. John's treasure.

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: Who's sayin' I have a big red-nose!?

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: See where I'm going with this?

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: So the higher Straw-Eat's bounty rises...

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: That's great, captain! Should we celebrate then?

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: You bet your ass we do!

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: Wait, who the hell are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: Oh, there's no need for polite introdu-

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Never lay a hand on whitebeard's crew!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: You're pretty knowledgeable about him, aren't you...

summary: Luffy ends Bellamy’s mockery with a single decisive blow, proving that dreams are not weakness.
